_readme: Provisional recipe (deliverable rendered, look not user-approved). Tracks GENERIC except the pins below.

notes.sep_engine: inpaint pinned: net FAILS the gate on this ultra-wide MW-dominated self-flat field (its starless keeps large-scale residual structure + bright-star shells on this class) while inpaint passes. No resolved object is in frame, so inpaint's structure-destruction failure mode cannot fire. Re-measure when a separation model with highlight protection lands (BACKLOG).
notes.solve: blind plate-solve fails on this wide field's lens edge distortion; solved via solve_field.py --central=0.25 --ra=186.7 --dec=-62.2 --radius-deg=15 (region read off a first no-WCS render)
